Surprise over come. So they say, Hey, it's really expensive, whatever you say. I totally understand. I had one of them just like you, same job, monocates, life changes, challenges, etc. Everything. And she came to the same conclusion yesterday, which is that she didn't have the money to the program. So I told her a story that made a lot of sense to me and it really helped. Susan, who's actually one of our best clients you see on the wall there who lost over 100 pounds when she started her fitness journey and why it's actually stuck for mine. If I share it with you. Sure. Awesome. So we tend to vote with our dollars about the things that we care about, right? Because we can say that we care about X, Y and Z, but what really matters at the end of the day is where we spend our money, right? Everything else we'd like to care about, but we don't actually care about it. We should put our dollars there, right? The things we really care about, we spend money on. So if we want to change the things that we care about, we have to change the way we vote with our dollars. So the interesting story I was going to tell you that that I told Susan that really helped her solidify this, it breaks down the same exact perception shift that she went through that you're going to have to go through at some point or another in order to actually achieve these health goals that your soul creates, that you're really after, right? It's about a young girl who goes to Sephora or MAC or one of the makeup stores. She's 14 years old. She goes there with one of her friends and the makeup lady, you know, with her smock, whatever comes and says, you need one of those pencils, you know, and this pencil and that pencil and some lipstick or whatever, basically your basic starter kit, right? And the sales lady or makeup lady was like, okay, so I want you to understand that moving forward, you need to start budgeting for things like this because it's something that you're going to start spending money on regularly, okay? And like Susan thought, Susan remember our like really big success story, she thought it was so interesting because what happened was that expenditure got that girl so excited. She was like, yes, I'm all in. I really like, I'm so excited because that purchase marked the transition from her going from a girl to accepting and becoming so being into that new identity of a woman with that new identity can do priorities, right? And so for her, now she knows that she's going to start wearing makeup and it's going to be start it's going to be an expense that she's going to have for the rest of her life because she's a woman, right? And so what we're talking about isn't going from a girl to woman, it's going from a woman that's unsatisfied with how you look, how you feel, etc, which is why you walked in today to a woman who is totally satisfied, who feels amazing when she looks in the mirror, totally confident, full of energy, like loves how she treats her kids and her husband and is setting a good example, right? And if you want to have that new identity, that new identity comes with new priorities in terms of where we spend money, right? Where we vote with our dollars. And if we really break it down, we're talking about 12 bucks a day, right? And on top of that, here's the thing that most women don't see but eventually find out after committing to the challenge is that with the new identity comes new savings, right? You're not going to go out as much to drink, you're not going to not going to go out and eat as much, you're not going to spend money on junk food, you're not going to spend money on doctors visits, there's lots of other things that come with the new identity that will actually save you money and offset that $12 a day really, really easily, right? And so we need to do for you is bring these new priorities along with you so you can solidify that identity shift so you can get what you're looking for and not just trying to lose weight but actually becoming that new identity, that new better version of yourself. So it sticks because there's nowhere for it to go because it's you now. So like every time you've yo-yoed in the past, every time you you start something and stop and you can't get it to stick and you can't stay motivated because it wasn't you yet. It was old you trying to stick something and it couldn't stick because you weren't becoming that new person. All right, it has to be an identity shift because I can tell you once you identify, once it becomes a part of who you are, there is no effort. It becomes effortless, I promise you. All right, because it's just, it's just, it's just like brushing your teeth, you go to the gym, it's just something that you do, right? And because that person who you want to be, that fit person, I'm telling you as someone who works out, like you spend money on health, right?
